message:
fix(daemon,cli): align staleness thresholds with daemon write cadence (bd-1u9)

Define shared constants DAEMON_STATE_WRITE_INTERVAL_SECS (30s) and
DAEMON_STATE_STALE_THRESHOLD_SECS (90s) in self_monitor.rs. Replace the
flawed (poll_interval_ms / 1000) * 2 formula (which produced 2s with the
default 1s poll interval) and the hardcoded 30s literal in
read_daemon_prediction with the shared 90s threshold in all three CLI
staleness check sites: render_status, run_check, read_daemon_prediction.

Includes concurrent agent changes: bd-ezo dashboard live mode,
bd-24a status --watch JSON streaming, bd-3uc EWMA timestamp guard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
